message:
bd-3bxhj.4.6: Effect/async translation to Cmd/subscription orchestration

Translate CanonicalEffectModel into EffectOrchestrationPlan with:
- Command/Subscription/FireAndForget runtime construct classification
- Explicit timeouts by effect kind (network 30s, storage 10s, etc.)
- Deterministic retry with exponential/linear/fixed backoff
- Cancellation policies (abort, subscription stop, explicit cleanup)
- Error strategies with risk-aware recovery actions
- Certification metadata for audit trail
- 31 tests covering all translation paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
